data.title: War with Iran hampers significant oil flow from Persian Gulf, causing more impact than reflected in prices.
data.description: The ongoing conflict with Iran in the Persian Gulf region has caused a significant decrease in the export of oil. Despite this, the widely monitored oil prices do not accurately reflect the extent of the disruption the situation has caused.

data.title: Treasury Secretary and Fed Chairman express concerns over Anthropic's AI, summoning banking leaders to address risks.
data.description: The Secretary of the Treasury and the Chairman of the Federal Reserve have called upon banking executives for a meeting to address concerns regarding the possible systemic risks posed by Anthropic's latest model.

data.title: Some companies, including Delta Air Lines and Amazon, are raising prices due to the Iran War, citing increased energy costs.
data.description: Several major companies, including Delta Air Lines, Amazon, and the United States Postal Service, are increasing prices in response to heightened energy costs linked to the conflict in Iran. This decision may affect consumers as they navigate the market with potentially higher expenses. The price hikes are anticipated to offset the impact of rising fuel prices and other related expenses brought about by the ongoing situation in Iran. This move by the companies underscores the economic ripple effects of geopolitical instability, with customers likely to face increased costs for essential services and goods in the near future. The specific percentage of price hikes has not been disclosed by the companies at this time.

data.title: Europe readies for rising inflation as investors anticipate interest rate hikes by ECB and BoE in 2022.
data.description: Investors are showing confidence in the possibility of interest rates being increased by the European Central Bank and the Bank of England within the current year.

data.title: March saw a surge in U.S. inflation due to rising energy costs, with Consumer Price Index increasing the most since June 2022.
data.description: Rising energy expenses resulted in the largest monthly surge in the Consumer Price Index since June 2022, during the peak of the post-pandemic inflation crisis.

data.title: Investors cautious as ceasefire talks on Iran face obstacles; eyes on US inflation report.
data.description: Investors are closely monitoring the temporary halt in the conflict with Iran, which is encountering various obstacles. The release of U.S. government statistics on inflation is being eagerly anticipated.

data.title: Longeye Announces Number of Police Files Scanned By Its AI Tool in 2025 and 2026
data.description: In San Francisco, Longeye, a developer of AI-powered investigative tools for law enforcement and the justice system, has revealed that its platform has processed a significant amount of data since its launch in October 2025. The data spans multiple American police departments and indicates a notable increase in the volume of files scanned and analyzed in 2026 compared to 2025. Guillaume Delepine, founder and CEO of Longeye, expressed satisfaction with the start in 2025, emphasizing the successful launch and growth trajectory.

data.title: Roblox Announces Roblox Plus, a New Subscription Plan Offering Exclusive Platform Benefits
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Roblox (NYSE: RBLX) unveiled a new subscription service called Roblox Plus. Launching worldwide on April 30, 2026, at a monthly cost of $4.99 USD, this plan aims to provide enhanced value for users. Subscribers will enjoy discounts on in-game and avatar item purchases along with exclusive perks on the platform. It's worth noting that Roblox will absorb the costs of these discounts to ensure creators receive their full earnings per item, granting them the potential to earn even more with the wider reach enabled by subscribers.
The Trump administration will extend the permit allowing a number of countries to purchase Russian oil on Friday - reports

data.title: PR Newswire Sets the Record Straight on AI Visibility: "Be the Source"
data.description: Recent revelations from a webinar hosted by GEO shed light on how businesses can thrive in the AI era with authority, consistency, and Multichannel Amplification™. The webinar, titled "GEO: Owning the AI Summary," showcased crucial strategies for success. This event took place on April 10, 2026, in New York. Key takeaways emphasized the importance of establishing authority, maintaining consistency, and utilizing Multichannel Amplification™ to navigate the evolving landscape. Industry experts shared valuable insights to help businesses succeed in this dynamic environment.

data.title: Green Builder Media Announces 2026 Sustainable Products of the Year and Brand Index Winners
data.description: An industry recognition event by Green Builder Media celebrates innovative solutions enhancing efficiency, durability, and well-being in homes. Located in LAKE CITY, Colo., on April 10, 2026, Green Builder Media revealed the victors of the 2026 Sustainable Products of the Year and Sustainable Brand Index.

data.title: Steward Partners Congratulates 29 Financial Advisors Recognized on Forbes | SHOOK 2026 Best-In-State Wealth Advisors List
data.description: Steward Partners, based in Stamford, Connecticut, recently celebrated the achievement of 29 of its advisor partners who were included in the prestigious Forbes | SHOOK 2026 Best-In-State Wealth Advisors list. The firm is known for being a full-service, employee-owned independent financial services provider. This marks the eighth year of the prestigious ranking, highlighting the top professionals in the industry.
Inflation Panic Sends US Consumer Confidence To All-Time Low: University Of Michigan

data.title: Bittensor's TAO faces 45% decline over 'decentralization theater' claim. TAO plunges 30% from weekly peak, as fractal patterns suggest deeper downturns.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TAO has experienced a significant decrease of 30% from its highest value of the week. This decline confirms the fractal setups that had previously indicated the potential for further decreases in the token's value.

data.title: Government officials caution banks about cybersecurity threats from Anthropic's Mythos AI.
data.description: Officials from the Treasury and Federal Reserve have recently informed banks about potential cybersecurity threats related to Anthropic's cutting-edge Mythos AI model. The AI model, known for its advanced capabilities, has raised concerns among authorities due to cybersecurity risks. The alert serves as a warning to banks to be cautious and prepared for potential cyber attacks. This development highlights the importance of cybersecurity measures in the financial sector, particularly with the increasing reliance on advanced technologies. Authorities are taking proactive steps to address these risks and ensure the security of banking systems.

KLÉPIERRE reports total voting rights and shares as of March 31, 2026.
QUADIENT SA: Monthly update on shares and voting rights totals.
Eurobio Scientific announces annual results for the year 2025.

data.title: LEPAS Ramps up Global Expansion at the 2026 International Business Summit
data.description: The International Business Summit (IBS 2026) is scheduled to be held in Wuhu, China on April 10, 2026. With the theme “Elegance Moves the World,” Chery Group's new NEV vehicle brand LEPAS will use this summit to advance its global strategic expansion endeavors. This move marks a crucial development in its global rollout strategy.
